[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001101011 5
1 010011110 5
2 101101011 6
3 001101111 6
4 011111101 7
5 110010111 6
6 100111011 6
7 111111111 a

34 43 111111111 a match 7

56 65 111111010 7
67 76 111111110 8
70 07 011111101 7 match 4

13 31 110011111 7
24 42 011111111 8
35 53 111111111 a match 7

57 75 011111110 7
60 06 111111111 a match 7
71 17 011111100 6

14 41 011111110 7

72 27 011111111 8

37 73 111111111 a match 7
